news.headline: US Shutdown threat by Trump, Musk; Putin's Annual Press Conference today. Catch up on Bloomberg The Pulse 12/19/24.
news.summary: Tensions rise as President Trump and billionaire Elon Musk issue warnings of a potential shutdown in the United States. Meanwhile, Russian President Putin hosts his annual press conference, addressing various issues. Stay informed with Bloomberg's The Pulse.

news.headline: Matt Carey appointed to head Business Development and Delivery at Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) in Rochester.
news.summary: A significant announcement was made today by Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc., a prominent company based in Rochester, New York. The company, listed on Nasdaq as OPTX, specializes in supplying crucial products to advanced technology sectors like defense, biomedical, and communications. An important change within the company has been revealed as Matt Carey has been appointed to oversee Business Development and Delivery. This move underscores the company's strategic focus on growth and expansion in key areas.

news.headline: Premise announces launch of Prime, an advanced retail data collection tool revolutionizing insights.
news.summary: Premise, a prominent company in the field of traditional trade insights and analytics solutions, has introduced Prime, a cutting-edge data collection tool on December 19, 2024. This tool is set to transform retail insights by offering advanced features. Prime aims to enhance the way retail data is gathered and leveraged, ultimately revolutionizing the industry.

news.headline: Dave Stewart emphasizes live events’ importance for Web3 music loyalty via SongBits. The platform drives Web3 music with charity support and promotes new voices.
news.summary: With involvement from Dave Stewart of Eurythmics, SongBits is at the forefront of advancing Web3 music. The platform is organizing live events that showcase emerging artists, while also contributing to charitable causes and influencing the future of the industry. This initiative seeks to innovate and promote new voices within the music realm, aligning with Stewart's vision for driving progress in the sector.

news.headline: Tyler Technologies' state partners in Arkansas and West Virginia won 2024 Government Experience Awards from the Center for Digital Government.
news.summary: Tyler Technologies, based in Plano, Texas, announced that their state partners in Arkansas and West Virginia were honored with 2024 Government Experience Awards by the Center for Digital Government.

news.headline: Cintas Corp (NASDAQ:CTAS) Q2 earnings beat expectations, with $2.56B sales (+7.8% Y/Y), $1.09 EPS, and 11.8% gross profit rise.
news.summary: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) saw a decline in shares following the release of its second-quarter earnings. The company reported quarterly sales of $2.56 billion, marking a 7.8% year-over-year increase and meeting the consensus. EPS stood at $1.09, surpassing the analyst prediction of $1.01. Gross profit for the quarter totaled $1.28 billion, up by 11.8% from the previous year, with the gross margin expanding to 49.8% from 48.0%. Further details regarding energy expenses including gasoline, natural gas, and electricity can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Radians donates $60,000+ worth of winter jackets to aid Memphis residents in need of warmth through partnership.
news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee on December 19, 2024, Radians®, a prominent PPE producer, has joined forces with the Memphis St. Patrick Parish Pastoral Council to offer warm clothing to individuals in need of shelter during the upcoming holiday season and the winter months to come. Approximately 80% of the...

news.headline: CompTIA Pentest+ certification focuses on identifying, mitigating, and reporting cyber weaknesses to protect systems.
news.summary: Newly updated exam, released on December 19, 2024 in Downers Grove, Illinois, allows cybersecurity professionals to demonstrate their abilities in identifying, mitigating, and reporting cyber vulnerabilities before they are exploited. This exam aims to validate skills in penetration testing and enhance expertise in cybersecurity. The exam covers various aspects of cyber weaknesses, providing professionals with an opportunity to showcase their capabilities.

news.headline: Global Conducting Polymers Market to reach $15.82B by 2034, with $7.35B valuation in 2024. Market leaders: 3M, Heraeus, Covestro.
news.summary: ResearchAndMarkets.com has included the "Conducting Polymers Market - A Global and Regional Analysis" report in its offerings. The market is anticipated to reach $7.35 billion by 2024 and is forecasted to grow at a CAGR of 7.97%, reaching $15.82 billion by 2034. One of the main drivers for this expansion is the increasing acknowledgment of the benefits provided by conducting polymers.

news.headline: Post-Quantum Cryptography Market valued at $356.4M in 2023, projected to reach $17.69B by 2034 with a CAGR of 41.47%.
news.summary: A report on the Post-Quantum Cryptography Market, focusing on applications, products, and global analysis, has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market was worth $356.4 million in 2023 and is predicted to experience a growth rate of 41.47%, with a projected value of $17.69 billion by 2034. Post-quantum cryptography is vital for safeguarding sensitive data, particularly in financial sectors.

news.headline: Global commercial vehicle fleet management sensors and monitors market projected to reach $2.72 billion by 2032 from $1.19 billion in 2023, growing at a CAGR of 9.27% from 2024-2032. Competitive analysis included.
news.summary: A report on the sensors and monitors market for commercial vehicle fleet management has been released, predicting significant growth. The global market is expected to increase from $1.19 billion in 2023 to $2.72 billion by 2032, representing a CAGR of 9.27% during the forecast period of 2024-2032. The analysis covers various applications and includes country-specific insights.

news.headline: BizCare Benefits offers automated, personalized health benefits for employers; partners with VensureHR. revolutionizing modern workforce.
news.summary: Today, in Clearwater, Florida, a new health benefits solution called BizCare Benefits has been unveiled. This platform is designed to assist employers in offering tailored benefits packages to their employees efficiently. BizCare Benefits is fully automated and has already begun collaborations with various insurance providers and partners. Through this partnership, businesses can now provide modern, comprehensive benefits packages that cater to the diverse needs of their workforce. In conjunction with this initiative, a collaboration with the top Professional Employer Organization (PEO) solution VensureHR has also been established.

news.headline: Sal Longo buys Zing Green Products, expanding into sustainable safety solutions, previously founded by Tom Prinzing in 2007.
news.summary: In December 19, 2024, Sal Longo, the ex-owner of Northern Safety Company, successfully purchased Zing Green Products, a prominent supplier of eco-friendly safety solutions. Zing Green Products, established by Tom Prinzing in 2007 as a consulting firm, transitioned into manufacturing under their ownership.

news.headline: FCP acquires 250-unit Alexan Miramar Apartments in Florida's Broward County, enhancing its portfolio.
news.summary: In a press release dated December 19, 2024, FCP® revealed their successful purchase of the Alexan Miramar Apartments in Miramar, FL. This modern multifamily complex comprises 250 units and is situated at 3155 SW 147th Terrace, within the prosperous Broward County market. The acquisition marks an important investment for FCP®, further establishing their presence in the real estate sector.

news.headline: Trump would support abolishing the debt ceiling - NBC.
Accenture reports Q1 sales of $17.69B, up 9% YoY, beats estimates. Consulting revenue at $9.05B, managed services at $8.64B. EPS $3.59 beats estimate of $3.39. Raises annual revenue outlook.
news.summary: Accenture Plc (NYSE:ACN) released its first-quarter fiscal 2025 sales figures, reporting a total of $17.69 billion, which surpassed analyst expectations of $17.12 billion. This marks a 9% increase year-over-year in U.S. dollars and a 5% increase in local currency. Revenues exceeded the company's forecasted range, coming in approximately $240 million higher than the top end of the anticipated $16.85 billion to $17.45 billion range. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $3.59 also outperformed the analyst consensus of $3.39.In terms of revenue breakdown, consulting revenues for the quarter stood at $9.05 billion, representing a 7% increase in U.S. dollars and a 6% increase in local currency. Managed Services revenues saw a growth to $8.64 billion, up by 11% in both U.S. dollars and local currency. Additionally, the company recently secured a significant contract with the U.S. Air Force worth $1.6 billion, aimed at enhancing Cloud One services.For more information, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: CEO of Henry Repeating Arms, Anthony Imperato, wins NYPD Humanitarian Award in 2024 for charitable work.
news.summary: In Rice Lake, Wisconsin on December 19, 2024, Henry Repeating Arms, a top firearms producer in the US, shared that Anthony Imperato, the Founder and CEO, received the esteemed Humanitarian Award from the New York Police Department Committee.

news.headline: MiniTool releases Partition Wizard 12.9, enhancing data recovery feature and user experience.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on December 19, 2024, MiniTool introduced the latest version of its software, MiniTool Partition Wizard 12.9. The updated release highlights enhancements to the Data Recovery functionality and a smoother purchasing process for users. This version brings significant improvements to the software, including efficient recovery features and a more user-friendly buying experience.

news.headline: Talroo hits milestone in 2024 with innovative features, ReadySetHire launch - AI recruiting platform for smarter hiring.
news.summary: This year, a top recruitment technology company saw improved business results for its partners by introducing a range of innovative features. The company also unveiled ReadySetHire, a user-friendly but robust tool incorporating data, AI, and technology to aid companies in making smarter recruitment decisions.

news.headline: J.S. Held reveals results of "Lending Climate in America" survey by Phoenix Management. Celebrating 50 years, the survey shows high levels of concern in the fourth quarter.
news.summary: Celebrating 50 years, consulting firm J.S. Held announced survey findings on the "Lending Climate in America" by Phoenix Management, a division of J.S. Held. The latest results from the fourth quarter reveal significant concern about...

news.headline: SupplyHouse.com completes $90K+ charitable initiatives for trades in 2024, supporting industry-aligned partnerships.
news.summary: In Melville, New York, on December 19, 2024, SupplyHouse.com, a prominent e-commerce platform for plumbing, HVAC, and electrical supplies, disclosed that their community outreach initiatives in 2024 allocated more than $90,000 to various industry-related collaborations. The funding supported a range of partnerships...

news.headline: Employees at 7 Amazon distribution centers go on strike. Company anticipates minimal impact on operations. #Teamsters #Amazon #Strike
news.summary: The major retailer announced that it anticipates minimal disruption from the strike initiated by a portion of Teamsters union members.

news.headline: Ripple Labs launched RLUSD stablecoin, pegged 1:1 to USD with cash/equivalents backing.
news.summary: The RLUSD stablecoin created by Ripple Labs is designed to maintain a value equivalent to one US dollar, backed by cash reserves or assets of equal value. This pegging system guarantees that 1 RLUSD is always worth exactly 1 US dollar.

news.headline: Somato™, natural sleep support from tomatoes, now Alkemist Assured™, by Nutraland USA. Dec 19, 2024, Irvine, Calif.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on December 19, 2024, Nutraland USA revealed that Somato™, a revolutionary component derived from whole foods, is the inaugural phytomelatonin obtained from tomatoes worldwide. This ingredient has now achieved Alkemist Assured™ status through Alkemist Labs' quality disclosure initiative.

news.headline: Birmingham Legion FC to start 2025 season at home against Atlanta United FC in preseason game.
news.summary: In December 19, 2024, Birmingham, Alabama will see the return of MLS as Birmingham Legion FC revealed plans to commence their preseason in 2025 by hosting Atlanta United FC. This anticipated matchup signifies a promising start for both teams as they gear up for exciting prospects in the upcoming season.

news.headline: Accion Opportunity Fund adds Gopi Billa from Deloitte and Karthik Venkataraman from Accion to its Board of Directors for economic mobility of small business owners.
news.summary: Principal Gopi Billa from Deloitte Consulting LLP and COO Karthik Venkataraman from Accion have recently joined a dedicated Board aiming to boost economic mobility for underserved small business owners. This diverse group, based in SAN JOSE, Calif., is focused on advancing opportunities for those in need. The appointment of these members on Dec. 19, 2024, adds valuable expertise to the board's efforts.

news.headline: Sony acquires 12.05M new KADOKAWA shares for approx. 50B yen, making it largest shareholder with 10% stake. Strengthening partnership.
news.summary: Sony Group Corporation (NYSE: SONY) has announced a strategic partnership with KADOKAWA CORPORATION involving a significant capital investment. Under the terms of the agreement, KADOKAWA will issue 12.05 million new shares to Sony on January 7, 2025, totaling approximately 50 billion yen, equivalent to about $319 million. This transaction will give Sony ownership of around 10% of KADOKAWA’s shares, making it the company's largest shareholder, supplementing shares obtained in February 2021. This alliance aims to bolster collaboration between the two entities, with a focus on expanding globally.

news.headline: Blackwell 3D establishes consulting unit in the UAE as wholly-owned subsidiary.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases globally has surpassed 200 million, with a grim death toll exceeding 4 million. The highly infectious Delta variant is causing a surge in cases, leading to renewed lockdown measures in various countries. Vaccination efforts continue, with over 4 billion doses administered worldwide. However, disparities in vaccine distribution persist, hindering efforts to curb the spread of the virus. Health experts emphasize the importance of immunization and adherence to safety protocols to prevent further outbreaks.

news.headline: Chevron and Woodside finalize $400 million asset swap deal involving interests in multiple projects.
news.summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) and Woodside Energy Group Limited (NYSE: WDS) recently concluded an asset exchange deal. Woodside will be transferring its 13% non-operated stake in the Wheatstone Project and its 65% operated stake in the Julimar-Brunello Project in Western Australia. In exchange, Woodside will gain Chevron’s 16.67% interest in the North West Shelf Project and the NWS Oil Project, along with a 20% interest in the Angel Carbon Capture and Storage Project. As part of the agreement, Chevron will also provide Woodside with a cash payment amounting to up to $400 million. This includes a $300 million payment upon completion, with additional contingent payments of up to $100 million depending on the transfer of the Julimar Phase 3 Project and other factors.

news.headline: Baby Boomer homeowners hold $17 trillion of total home equity, likely passing wealth to children.
news.summary: Recent findings reveal that Baby Boomers collectively possess a substantial $17 trillion in home equity, which accounts for a significant portion of the country's overall home equity.

news.headline: Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corp received $182M in dredging awards, largest in US, on Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: Houston, on December 19, 2024 - The leading dredging services provider in the United States, Great Lakes Dredge & Dock Corporation (NASDAQ: GLDD), disclosed the reception of numerous dredging contracts worth a combined total of $182 million.

news.headline: New dining reservation app diibs launched in NYC allowing users to bid for last-minute, high-demand tables.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in New York City, a cutting-edge dining reservation application has emerged, changing the way residents secure last-minute reservations at popular restaurants. The innovative platform, diibs, allows diners to place bids for coveted last-minute reservations. This app is revolutionizing the dining experience in the city by offering a unique way to book tables at in-demand restaurants.

news.headline: Princeton Review's SAT Prep Program meets ESSA II standards, shows significant improvements in student scores.
news.summary: A study on the effectiveness of Instructure revealed significant improvements in student outcomes for users of the SAT prep program. Conducted in New York on December 19, 2024, by The Princeton Review®, a prominent education services company, the study demonstrated statistically significant benefits for students utilizing the program. The findings highlight the positive impact of the SAT prep program on student performance.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures rebound after positive GDP & jobless claims; Micron plunges on earnings.
news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones showed an upward trend on Thursday following the release of surprising figures related to the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) and weekly unemployment claims. Amidst this positive movement, Micron, a prominent player in the AI chip industry, experienced a significant decline in its stock value following its earnings report. The rebound in Dow Jones futures came after unexpected GDP and jobless claims numbers. Micron, a leading company in AI chips, witnessed a sharp drop in its stock price due to its earnings results.

news.headline: Rice University cuts student costs by $650M over 5 years with free tuition program, boosting access to education.
news.summary: Rice University President Reginald DesRoches emphasized the importance of removing financial obstacles for talented individuals in a recent statement. As of December 19, 2024, the university has been commemorating more than five years of enhancing access to higher education through The Rice Investment. This initiative has been pivotal in providing significant financial aid support to students, ensuring that exceptional individuals are not limited by economic constraints.

news.headline: Katherine Virkstis named Chief Clinical Officer at Get Well, leading digital patient engagement. - Dec. 19, 2024
news.summary: A prominent figure in the industry foresees a significant clinical integration through Get Well's advancements in digital patient engagement. Bethesda, Md., Dec. 19, 2024 - Get Well, a top player in digital patient engagement, disclosed the appointment of Katherine Virkstis as the new Chief Clinical Officer. This development marks a key step in the company's strategy to deepen its clinical connections.

news.headline: AHEAD named 2024 Gartner Peer Insights Customers' Choice for Data Center Outsourcing; leading cloud provider.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 19, 2024, AHEAD, a prominent company specializing in cloud and digital infrastructure solutions, received recognition as a Customers' Choice in the 2024 Gartner Peer Insights report for Data Center Outsourcing and Hybrid Infrastructure Managed services. This acknowledgement highlights AHEAD's exceptional performance and customer satisfaction within the industry.

news.headline: NYSE introduces daily pre-market update and EOY video content starting December 19, 2024, providing market insights.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) announced the introduction of a daily pre-market update along with exclusive content from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can now access valuable market insights and other relevant content before the start of trading. Stay ahead of the market with the latest information directly from NYSE.

news.headline: Lemon Seed Marketing opens exclusive conference to home service industry in LUFKIN, Texas, on Jan 2025.
news.summary: A renowned branding and marketing agency catering to the trades sector is opening up registration for an event that was previously exclusive to clients. Lemon Seed Marketing, based in Lufkin, Texas, will be hosting its fifth annual Lemon Seed Conference on January 1, 2025. This event is expected to attract a large number of attendees from the home service industry and promises to provide valuable insights for participants.

news.headline: LakeShore Biopharma reports strong financial results for H1 FY2025: RMB 371.9M revenue, 82.6% gross margin, 31.6% decrease in operating expenses.
news.summary: Total revenue reached RMB 371.9 million, marking a 36.2% year-on-year increase. Gross profit rose to RMB 307.3 million, showing a 39.1% year-on-year growth. The gross margin also saw an increase to 82.6% from 80.9% in the corresponding period of FY2024. Operating expenses decreased to RMB 276.4 million, representing a 31.6% year-on-year decline.

news.headline: Karma Automotive expands with new Detroit office and Netherlands headquarters, launching 3rd-gen Karma Revero EREV.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on December 19, 2024, Karma Automotive, the sole ultra-luxury automaker in America, unveiled the launch of its 3rd Generation Karma Revero EREV sport sedan. The company also revealed two key achievements in its efforts to increase its workforce and expand its operations.

news.headline: Flack Global Metals executes first busheling futures contract tied to Chicago No. 1, transforming steel supply chain.
news.summary: Flack Global Metals (FGM), a vertically integrated industrial business platform based in Scottsdale, Arizona, revealed on December 19, 2024, their involvement as a counterparty in the inaugural Busheling Ferrous Scrap Futures contract linked to the Chicago No. 1. This move signifies a significant step in transforming the steel supply chain.

news.headline: PNC Bank announces $128 million fund for affordable housing across US to support development and rehab of rental housing.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 19, 2024, PNC Bank, N.A. disclosed the completion of Low-Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) Fund 96, directing $128 million towards enhancing and constructing affordable rental housing projects nationwide.

news.headline: ASC Student Supercomputer Challenge 2025 will be hosted by Qinghai University in Beijing; important event for technology enthusiasts.
news.summary: In 2025, Qinghai University will host the ASC Student Supercomputer Challenge.

news.headline: December new-vehicle retail sales increased by 11.9%, reaching an all-time high in consumer spending on new vehicles.
news.summary: New-vehicle retail sales soared by 11.9% in December, according to J.D. Power, marking an all-time high in consumer spending on new vehicles in Troy, Michigan.

news.headline: Stryten Energy unveils mobile microgrid, Reluctance, at CES 2025 in Las Vegas. Includes innovative concept Jeep for off-grid power.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, Stryten Energy LLC, a U.S.-based energy storage solutions provider, is set to showcase Reluctance, a groundbreaking mobile microgrid model, at CES 2025 in Las Vegas. This unique project features a modified concept Jeep named Reluctance, which is designed to access remote areas unsuitable for conventional vehicles. The innovative vehicle is capable of supplying power for off-grid expeditions and offering crucial emergency power support in disaster-stricken regions. Operating as a hybrid diesel-electric automobile, Reluctance embodies resilience and adaptability.

news.headline: LRE begins commercial operations of 200MW Morrow Lake Solar project in Texas, supplying Microsoft under a long-term agreement.
news.summary: In Dallas, LRE (Leeward Renewable Energy) has successfully finished and commenced operations of the 200-megawatt (MW) Morrow Lake Solar project. Situated in Frio County, Texas, this project is set to supply renewable energy to Microsoft Corp. under a recently confirmed long-term power purchase agreement. Morrow Lake Solar represents the initial solar facility out of the two developed under the same agreement with Microsoft. Furthermore, this project marks LRE's second installation in Frio County, with the site situated across from its first project in the area.

news.headline: Ben Fujihara appointed Director of Capital at Rising Phoenix Capital in Dallas.
news.summary: Rising Phoenix Capital, a Dallas company, has recently appointed Ben Fujihara as their new Director of Capital.

news.headline: USDA awards Advancing Eco Agriculture $3.8M grant to expand regenerative farming production.
news.summary: Advancing Eco Agriculture (AEA) in Aurora, Colorado, has been granted $3.8 million by USDA Rural Development under the Fertilizer Production Expansion Program (FPEP). This program supports organizations with high potential to enhance the production and distribution of fertilizer and nutrient alternatives in the U.S. The grant aims to help AEA increase their manufacturing capacity.

news.headline: JIC prepares for 2025/2026 upfront, updates guidelines for VideoAmp as transactable, issues audit to all certified measurement companies.
news.summary: The Joint Industry Committee (JIC) has recently revised its "Guidelines for Transactability" document to acknowledge VideoAmp as transactable in representing demographic data after improvements were made to its services. In line with these changes, JIC has issued audits to all approved measurement firms to ensure the reliability of the updated data. This move comes as part of efforts to verify the integrity of information that will be integrated by these companies.
